parameters.name: envelope
parameters.description: Envelope metadata used for signing, field insertion, and version-specific PDF handling.

parameters.name: envelopeItem
parameters.description: The envelope item that includes the current document data and metadata required for saving the signed PDF.

parameters.name: envelopeItemFields
parameters.description: The list of fields to insert into the PDF before signing.

parameters.name: isRejected
parameters.description: Indicates whether the document is rejected and should receive a rejection stamp.

parameters.name: rejectionReason
parameters.description: The reason text to render on the rejection stamp when the document is rejected.

parameters.name: pdfData
parameters.description: The raw PDF bytes to be decorated, signed, and potentially augmented with certificate or audit log pages.

parameters.name: certificateDoc
parameters.description: An optional PDF document containing the certificate pages to attach to the final signed PDF.

parameters.name: auditLogDoc
parameters.description: An optional PDF document containing audit log pages to attach to the final signed PDF.
